A critical geographic and semantic anomaly defines its current reality: it is registered on Changle Road in Qinhuai District—the historic urban core of Nanjing—which is unsuitable for heavy manufacturing today. Furthermore, its business scope uniquely combines traditional electrical equipment manufacturing (like legacy bakelite appliances and switchgears) with 'property leasing' (房屋租赁).
